scripts.dev: pnpm generate:brand-assets && pnpm generate:privacy-policy && pnpm generate:notices && TINYTINKERER_SKIP_BRAND_ASSET_GENERATION=1 turbo run dev --filter=@tinytinkerer/edge --filter=@tinytinkerer/host
scripts.build: pnpm generate:brand-assets && pnpm generate:privacy-policy && pnpm generate:notices && TINYTINKERER_SKIP_BRAND_ASSET_GENERATION=1 turbo run build
scripts.build:pages: pnpm generate:brand-assets && pnpm generate:privacy-policy && pnpm generate:notices && TINYTINKERER_SKIP_BRAND_ASSET_GENERATION=1 TINYTINKERER_DEPLOY_BASE=/tinytinkerer turbo run build
scripts.lint: pnpm generate:brand-assets && pnpm generate:privacy-policy && pnpm generate:notices && TINYTINKERER_SKIP_BRAND_ASSET_GENERATION=1 turbo run lint && node ./scripts/check-boundaries.mjs
scripts.test: pnpm generate:brand-assets && pnpm generate:privacy-policy && pnpm generate:notices && turbo run test && pnpm compliance:test
scripts.typecheck: pnpm generate:brand-assets && pnpm generate:privacy-policy && pnpm generate:notices && turbo run typecheck
